question: What is RTI Cell at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has an RTI (Right to Information) Cell. For RTI queries: https://gbpiet.ac.in/rti-gbpiet/. RTI Contacts: https://gbpiet.ac.in/rti-contacts/

question: Does GBPIET have Women Cell?
answer: Yes! GBPIET has a Women Cell for addressing grievances and concerns of female students and staff. Contact the college office: 01368-228030

question: How to submit public grievance at GBPIET?
answer: Public grievances can be submitted through the Public Grievance Portal: https://pgportal.gov.in/. For college-level grievances contact: 01368-228030 or director@gbpiet.ac.in

question: What is IQAC at GBPIET?
answer: IQAC (Internal Quality Assurance Cell) at GBPIET ensures quality in education and administration. IQAC document: https://gbpiet.ac.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/IQAC_GBPIET.pdf

question: What are the conduct rules at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has strict conduct rules for students. Academic rules: https://gbpiet.ac.in/academic-rules-and-regulations/. Anti-ragging: https://gbpiet.ac.in/conduct-rules/anti-ragging-measures/. Helpline: 7017059887
